user_query: I'm interested in knowing the local time and timezone information for the coordinates 51.5074° N, 0.1278° W. Additionally, please provide me with the nearest three cities, their populations, and the distances from my location.

TaskList.description: Retrieve local time and timezone information for the given coordinates (51.5074° N, 0.1278° W).
Find the three nearest cities to the given coordinates.
Get population data for the three nearest cities retrieved in the previous step.
Calculate the distances from the given coordinates to the three nearest cities.
